creator: sakaue.mamoru@samurai.mwghennn.net
text:
[This is a resubmitted PR which had been once attempted at July 10 but seems lost.]

The software version is updated to 3.0.2.

Version 3.0.1 had a serious defect that newly installed files can be spoiled by restoration of conflicting old packages. When the current version is to executed only for limited ports (with -q, -t, -T or -O) after this previous version was used, in advance to that, it is strongly encouraged to execute 
# portsreinstall pkgsanity 
and select "y" in the queries for spoiled packages.

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
